articles.author: Anchal Vohra
articles.title: Italy's Meloni breaks with Trump over war in Iran, pope - DW.com
articles.description: The war in Iran and a spat between two of the world's most influential Americans has forced Giorgia Meloni to choose sides, potentially pushing the Italian prime minister to align herself with Europe's center-right.
articles.content:
Donald Trump's attacks on Pope Leo XIV and a social media post depicting the US president as an AI-generated Jesus proved to be the breaking point for Giorgia Meloni.
